hb8de52a4gdbc1g45b1g9b5dg43fe58243b1c: We'll show those heretics. Burn them all to the ground!
hd4ed9849gdb55g4c44gbbdag87b4b4984f8a: Never thought I'd be followin' a tiefling into battle - and against your own kind!
hfdaf041ege5c1g4090gb7dfgc98ae380e0e3: Never thought I'd be followin' a drow of my own free will - and then come out of battle alive!
h22692ac7ge959g4dc7gac63gba133c90799e: Never thought I'd follow someone like you into battle - but you're twice as mean as any hobgoblin!
hb7c37c30g2281g4766g98c8g9583d6f7d2a7: Guess ya do have some devil's blood in there, dont'cha?
h6896405dge91ag4e04g97f6g3edf540faf05: The Absolute smiles on you. On all of us!
